commit.subject: LU-8465 tests: enable pfsck if possible
commit.message:
LU-8465 tests: enable pfsck if possible

To test pfsck widely, try enable pfsck by default
for Lustre tests.

Signed-off-by: Wang Shilong <wshilong@ddn.com>
